event_name: UFC Fight Night: Moicano vs. Duncan

key_factors: Moicano's elite grappling and submission threat neutralizes Duncan's power
Significant reach and volume striking advantage for Moicano
Duncan has never faced elite-level MMA competition at this weight
Sharp money moved heavily toward Moicano fight week
predictions.analysis: Moicano steps up to heavyweight as a massive underdog on paper but the data tells a different story. His grappling credentials at lightweight/welterweight translate upward — Duncan has never faced a submission specialist of this caliber. Expect Moicano to drag this to the mat early, neutralize Duncan's size advantage, and grind out a decision or find a late submission. LOCK tier — model and market consensus aligned.

key_factors: Jacoby's striking volume and output advantage over 3 rounds
Prachnio's durability is a concern — gets hit clean regularly
Jacoby coming off two solid performances, momentum on his side
predictions.analysis: Jacoby is the cleaner striker with better gas tank. Prachnio brings raw power but gets touched up by elite strikers. Lean toward Jacoby on points.

key_factors: Rebecki's relentless pressure and volume output at lightweight
Borshchev's chin has been tested — stopped twice in UFC
Model favors Rebecki's pace to break Borshchev down late
predictions.analysis: Rebecki is a high-output pressure fighter who wears people down. Borshchev has been stopped before and Rebecki's style exposes that. Lean with finish upside.

key_factors: Blanchfield's submission game is best in division
Fiorot's striking is elite — keeps range well
Toss-up: model splits 51/49, market near even
predictions.analysis: One of the tightest fights on the card. Fiorot is the better striker, Blanchfield the better grappler. If this stays standing Fiorot wins, if Blanchfield gets it down she wins. Slight lean Blanchfield — her submission threat forces Fiorot into uncomfortable positions.

key_factors: Quarantillo's power and pressure style tailor-made for Mariscal
Mariscal has been finished by strikers of this caliber before
Sharp line movement — Quarantillo opened -160, now -210
predictions.analysis: Billy Q is a bully on the feet and Mariscal doesn't have the footwork to stay clean. Sharp money moved hard toward Quarantillo — when public and sharp money align, you follow. LOCK tier.

two_leg.note: Both LOCK tier. Strong correlation — both finish-capable, both sharp money backed.

three_leg.note: Add Rebecki for upside — finish potential inflates parlay value.
